# Anogeissus — Full Product Information

> Professional photography tools for Mac, iPad, and iPhone. Built by photographers, for photographers.

Website: https://anogeissus.com
Company: Anogeissus Limited

---

## ApolloOne — The Fastest Image Viewer on the Planet

ApolloOne is a high-performance photo and video viewer for macOS designed for professional photographers and enthusiasts who need speed and precision, with full HDR display and export support.

### Key Features
- Browse photos at up to 32 fps on M1 Ultra — 100MP RAW files load instantly
- Full image resolution display, not scaled-down previews — ready for immediate zoom and edit
- Full HDR display on EDR-capable Macs: 10-bit color, HDR RAW rendering, HDR filmstrip thumbnails via gain-map HEIC cache, one-click HDR toggle in the toolbar, dual SDR + HDR histogram
- HDR Visualizer: four false-color bands (cyan +1 EV, blue +2 EV, purple +3 EV, magenta +4 EV) overlay the image to show highlight headroom; hover a band in the histogram to isolate that zone. Per-pixel inspector shows 0–255 for SDR channels and +X.X EV for channels above SDR white
- HDR export: AVIF and JPEG XL in PQ colorspace for full HDR; gain-map JPEG and HEIC that stay viewable on SDR displays; scene-linear OpenEXR for professional workflows
- Quick Edit for non-destructive adjustments on RAW, JPEG, HEIF/HEIC, TIFF, and PNG
- EXIF Inspector — view and edit comprehensive camera metadata, double-click any field to change it
- Camera AF point overlay — see autofocus points recorded in the image (unique feature)
- Interactive Maps — Apple Maps and Google Maps with Street View, drag-and-drop GPS editing
- Spotlight indexing — find photos by address, camera model, or shooting data from Spotlight
- Contact Sheet mode with histogram
- Split View for side-by-side image comparison with synchronized zoom and pan
- GPU-accelerated slideshow with Apple Music playlist support
- Customizable toolbar to match your workflow
- Auto Advance Mode for fast file culling
- Batch operations: rename, resize, convert, export (including HEIC and 16-bit TIFF/PNG)
- RegEx search across any EXIF metadata field
- Supports RAW, HDR RAW, JPEG, HEIF/HEIC (including Apple gain-map HDR), TIFF, PNG, JPEG XL, AVIF (including PQ HDR), OpenEXR (read and write), video files, and more

### Editions
- **Free**: Browse and view — works indefinitely
- **Standard**: Adds EXIF editing, batch operations, cropping, AF point overlay, keyword filters, slideshow music
- **Pro**: Adds Split View, batch resize/convert, HEIC export, card import, RegEx search, and more

### System Requirements
- macOS 11 Big Sur and above
- Apple Silicon or Intel Macs

### App Store
https://apps.apple.com/app/apolloone-photo-video-viewer/id1044484672?mt=12

### Customer Reviews (App Store)
- ★★★★★ "ApolloOne's speed is no joke: I can mouse wheel through burst mode RAW photos with instantaneous response, no screen blackouts, and no temporary low-resolution image rendering."
- ★★★★★ "This app made me realize how much I hate catalog-based apps. Great work. Money well spent."
- ★★★★★ "Feature rich, very fast, actively developed. I emailed the developer with a minor problem and within days a new release was on the App Store."
- ★★★★★ "Works perfect as a photo & video viewer — even with a clicker for projector slideshows."

---

## ApolloOne GO — RAW Culling for iPad and iPhone (Coming Soon)

ApolloOne GO brings the ApolloOne workflow to iPad and iPhone: a fast RAW viewer and culling tool for reviewing a shoot in the field. Browse any folder, external drive, or SD card straight from the Files app — no import, no library — or plug the camera itself into the USB-C port and browse the shoot right off the body. Powered by the same RawBridge™ engine as ApolloOne and Camera RawX.

### Key Features
- Camera connection: plug the camera body into USB-C and browse it directly — works even with cameras that never mount as a drive (uses the same protocol as Photos import). Fast thumbnail grid, full-screen embedded JPEG previews with pinch-zoom and AF point/face overlays, then import only the selected keepers at USB speed
- Full-resolution RAW viewing (folder and SD-card sources) with HDR display on HDR-capable devices, or embedded JPEG previews for maximum speed
- Camera AF point and face overlays to verify focus at a glance
- Pick/Reject culling with two thumb-sized buttons, mirrored placement for left-handed use, optional on-screen navigation buttons
- Culling decisions written as standard macOS Finder color tags (green = pick, red = reject) that sync through iCloud Drive — ApolloOne and Finder on the Mac see them automatically, with no export step, database, or sidecar files
- Contact sheet with three zoom levels, sorting, and All/Picked/Rejected filters
- Batch operations: pick, reject, or unmark ranges of images; copy, move, or delete
- AirDrop original RAW files, RAW with JPG/HIF pairs, or lightweight embedded JPEGs
- Applies Quick Edit adjustments made in ApolloOne on display
- Opens RAW formats iPadOS can't handle on its own via RawBridge™

### Availability
Coming soon to the App Store for iPad and iPhone. One-time purchase, no subscription.

Details: https://anogeissus.com/apolloone-go.html

---

## Camera RawX — Quick Look for Every RAW File

Camera RawX is a macOS extension that adds Quick Look previews and Finder thumbnails for camera RAW files that macOS doesn't support natively. HDR RAW files preview in full HDR on EDR-capable Macs. Powered by the RawBridge™ engine — the same high-performance RAW decoder used in ApolloOne.

### Key Features
- Renders a RAW image in about 1 second on Apple Silicon
- Adds Finder thumbnails for unsupported RAW files
- Full-resolution Quick Look previews with HDR rendering for HDR RAW files on EDR-capable Macs
- Works with ApolloOne's Quick Edit — adjustments and crop applied automatically in Quick Look
- Fujifilm compressed RAF and Nikon HE/HE* via Apple RAW decoder for high visual quality

### Supported Formats
Adobe DNG, Canon (.CR2, .CR3), Fujifilm (including compressed RAF), Nikon (including HE/HE* NEF), Olympus, Panasonic, Samsung, Sigma Foveon X3F, Sony (.ARW, .ARQ)

### System Requirements
- macOS 12 Monterey and above
- Apple Silicon or Intel Macs
- 4GB RAM minimum, 8GB recommended

### App Store
https://apps.apple.com/app/camera-rawx/id6587554858?mt=12

### Customer Reviews (App Store)
- ★★★★★ "A must-have if you shoot RAW. Seeing Finder previews is a huge advantage. A steal even at twice the price."
- ★★★★★ "If this had been £100 I would have still bought it. I nearly paid £250 for a bigger card just to shoot RAW+JPEG as a workaround."
- ★★★★★ "Does exactly what it says on the tin. Works flawlessly. Displays my RAW images much faster than previously."
- ★★★★★ "I'm so relieved. Finally! Someone heard my prayers!"

---

## KatClaw — AI Automation for macOS

KatClaw is the native macOS companion for OpenClaw. Security-first design with exec approvals, allowlists, and health checks built in.

Website: https://katclaw.ai
